//: Strict type-check GATE for the typed core (the pure math + the data loader). The verbatim view modules (src/dashboard.tsx, src/bubblegauge.tsx) are NOT yet strict-typed and are excluded — typing them is the next incremental pass. strictNullChecks is deliberately off for now (the data-guaranteed .find() lookups would need `!` body edits); noImplicitAny is the load-bearing check here.
